metaDescription: Hire Iman Barzegari — digital nomad freelancer for websites, drone films, AI/ML systems, and anything digital. Remote worldwide.
heroLead: Websites, drone films, ML systems, automation — delivered from anywhere in the world. One person, full stack, cinematic eye.
servicesTitle: What I can do for you
servicesIntro: I work remotely as a digital nomad. Whether you need code, content, or both — I ship real projects, not just ideas.
serviceWebDesc: Portfolio sites, online stores, APIs, Chrome extensions, and polished web apps — from design to deployment.
serviceDroneDesc: Aerial films, travel reels, nature cinematography, and social content that makes places feel alive.
serviceAiDesc: Machine learning pipelines, data tools, automation scripts, and intelligent features inside your product.
serviceAnythingDesc: Freelance consulting, technical writing, integrations, and custom digital work — tell me what you need.
proofIntro: A mix of code I ship and stories I film on the road.
why1Desc: I am a full-stack developer and ML engineer who also films with a drone. You get technical depth and creative output.
why2Desc: I work from anywhere with a laptop and a camera. Clear communication, fast iterations, and reliable delivery.
why3Desc: This page is available in many languages — great for clients across the region and worldwide.
contactLead: Tell me about your project — website, video, AI, or something entirely new. I'll get back to you.
